title: Shift Cost Efficiency Calculator
description: Calculates the overall cost efficiency of a production shift based on labor, material, energy, quality, and downtime factors, aligned with ISO 22400, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Shift Duration (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total scheduled shift time in hours. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 hours.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total scheduled shift time in hours. Standard shifts are 8 or 12 hours.

inputs.label: Total Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total good units produced during the shift, including reworked units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total good units produced during the shift, including reworked units.

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that failed quality inspection and are not reworkable.

inputs.label: Rework Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that required rework to meet quality standards.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully loaded labor cost per operator per hour.

inputs.label: Number of Operators
inputs.businessContext: Total operators assigned to the shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operators assigned to the shift.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit produced.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit produced.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Shift
inputs.businessContext: Total energy cost (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy cost (electricity, gas, etc.) for the shift.

inputs.label: Shift Type
inputs.businessContext: Shift type affects labor premiums and energy tariffs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Shift type affects labor premiums and energy tariffs.

inputs.label: Overtime Applied
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if overtime rates apply to any portion of the shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if overtime rates apply to any portion of the shift.

rules.message: Defective and rework units cannot exceed total units produced.
Total downtime cannot exceed shift duration in minutes.
Night shift overtime may require additional premium calculations.

thresholds.alert: Critical: Shift cost efficiency is below 50%. Immediate review required.
Warning: Defect rate exceeds 10%. Investigate root cause.
Alert: Unplanned downtime exceeds 60 minutes. Review maintenance logs.
